sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70455" key="neoxru/seos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-χρύσεος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70455.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">new and golden,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0205.tlg001:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philod.Scarph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">123</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
